subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou seest Thy handmaiden who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and who hath turned toward the ocean of Thy grace and the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی الهی الهی تری امتک التی آمنت بک و بایاتک قد اقبلت الی بحر فضلک و افق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
